meta.title: Jonathan Brownstein — Sr. Data Analyst (Life Insurance Conversion)
meta.description: Senior data analyst for life insurance and annuity admin system conversion support. Alteryx, Excel, SQL. Available immediately for remote contract work.

typingPhrases: Life Insurance and Annuity Data Validation
hero.description: Senior data analyst with fifteen years supporting life insurance, reinsurance, and financial reporting work where policy values, product features, and large extracts have to reconcile cleanly across systems. Seven years inside the Data Analytics Office of a global reinsurer, partnering with actuarial, valuation, finance, product, and IT on balancing style comparisons, conversion ready documentation, and the repeatable analysis that product support teams need when blocks move between administrative platforms. Six years as Assistant Business Controller inside a global manufacturer, owning planning cycles and the Excel driven reporting that leadership used every month. Day to day toolkit includes Alteryx, advanced Excel, SQL, Python, R, Power BI, Tableau, and SSRS. FLMI from LOMA, MS in Economics with an Applied Econometrics certificate, and BS in Economics. Available immediately for remote contract work.

highlights.label: Life insurance and annuity data validation
Balancing reports and source to target reconciliation
Alteryx, Excel, and SQL data manipulation
Admin system conversion analysis and difference research

items.title: Senior Data Analyst III
items.context: Senior data analysis and validation lead inside the Data Analytics Office
items.intro: Senior individual contributor supporting life reinsurance analytics for actuarial, valuation, finance, and related partners. Work centered on large policy and valuation extracts, balancing style comparisons across systems and periods, documented research when values did not line up, and the production ready analysis product and finance stakeholders needed for period close and initiative reviews.

subsections.title: Balancing Analysis, Conversion Style Validation, and Difference Research
bullets: Built and operated the firm's first valuation extract comparison framework for comparing reporting and policy related outputs across periods and source systems.
Analyzed balancing style outputs and multi source extracts, documented differences, and researched likely causes before recommending follow up changes.
Executed detailed, repeatable validation steps across large life insurance and reinsurance datasets with clear written results for product, actuarial, and finance partners.
Partnered with actuarial process and control minded stakeholders on how differences should be investigated, logged, and signed off.

subsections.title: Alteryx, Excel, SQL, and Large Scale Data Manipulation
bullets: Designed Alteryx workflows to prepare, join, and compare large extracts, reducing manual spreadsheet handoffs.
Wrote SQL queries against warehouse and extract sources to isolate policy, valuation, and portfolio populations, then reconciled results in Excel.
Combined Alteryx, Excel, SQL, Python, and R when needed, documenting assumptions and transformation steps for rerunability.
Applied statistical outlier and anomaly detection across platforms processing very large record volumes.

subsections.title: Life Insurance Product Context, Reporting, and Stakeholder Delivery
bullets: Supported life reinsurance analytics where product features, policy values, and in force movement mattered, drawing on FLMI coursework and actuarial partnership.
Built and maintained Power BI, Tableau, and SSRS packages for KPI review, variance commentary, and financial movement analysis.
Created documentation covering lineage, refresh cadence, ownership, and control points so analysis processes remained operable after handoff.

items.title: Assistant Business Controller
items.organization: Chicago Pneumatic Company LLC (Atlas Copco Group)
items.context: FP&A and corporate finance partner inside a global industrial manufacturer
bullets: Owned annual planning, monthly forecasting, and budgeting for finance, sales, operations, marketing, HR, and regional leadership.
Built financial models and automated KPI dashboards in advanced Excel, shortening month end analysis cycles.
Reconciled operational and financial datasets across spreadsheets and system extracts, documenting differences until numbers were reliable for executive review.
Partnered across accounting, finance, operations, and technology on reporting and finance systems improvements.

groups.title: Conversion and validation
items: Life insurance and annuity data analysis, balancing reports, source to target reconciliation, difference research, admin system conversion support

groups.title: Tools
items: Alteryx, advanced Excel and VBA, SQL, Python, R, Power BI, Tableau, SSRS, Databricks

groups.title: Domain and delivery
items: Actuarial and finance partnership, FLMI life product literacy, audit ready documentation, release oriented process execution
